name: capillaris-migration
description: MySQL → PostgreSQL migration scripts for Capillaris

scripts.mysql:up: docker compose up -d mysql-legacy && echo 'Waiting for MySQL...' && sleep 10 && echo 'MySQL ready on port 3307'
scripts.mysql:load: docker exec -i capillaris-mysql-legacy mysql -uroot -pmigration capillaris_legacy < dump.sql
